summary: First-finish smoke test for The Urban Bungalow. All 14 backend endpoints and 7 frontend flows tested end-to-end against public preview URL. Everything works including JWT auth, reservation creation, admin reservation list, status PATCH, stats, logout, route protection, and toast feedback.
passed: POST /api/reservations valid body -> 201, status=pending, Café unicode preserved
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token -> 200 returns admin user
GET /api/admin/stats -> 200 returns {total, today, pending, confirmed, seated, cancelled, no-show}
Frontend home loads with hero 'One place. Many stories.', menu preview, reservation form
Reservation form submit via UI (data-testid res-*) -> success toast + reservation appears in admin
/staff login with seeded creds -> redirects to /admin, dashboard renders rows + stats + filters
Status dropdown (status-btn -> set-status-{id}-seated) updates row to SEATED with 'Marked seated' toast
Sign out from /admin returns user to /staff
notes: Console shows expected 401s on initial /api/auth/me probe when not logged in (handled gracefully by AuthContext). Cross-site cookie + localStorage Bearer fallback both functional. Admin dashboard uses custom dropdown (not Radix Select) with testids data-testid='status-btn-{id}' and 'set-status-{id}-{status}'.
